creator: destination_wellknown
caption:
Let’s get this debate settled 👇

If you’ve ever been on a summer holiday anywhere in Europe, then you know that I’m talking about:

Grown ups wearing football shirts on their holidays 😀

It’s a controversial topic and I won’t even dip my toes in this heated debate, but I will say that I saw quite a few lovely older British women wearing Liverpool shirts in Lanzarote last year and that warmed my heart a bit 😀

#travellife #summerholidays

transcription.text: Right guys, we need to get this debate settled once and for all, so if you could all just vote down below, that'd be great. Thank you.
